title: GLM-5.2 + OpenDesign: SOTA CHEAP DESIGN SYSTEM! This is AWESOME!
summary: A video demonstration showing how to use GLM-5.2 with OpenDesign to generate high-quality UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The workflow produces polished HTML and CSS artifacts with consistent design properties. OpenDesign can be installed via desktop app, from source, or Docker.
writeup: This walkthrough pairs GLM-5.2 with OpenDesign to generate UI prototypes, including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The workflow outputs polished HTML and CSS artifacts that hold consistent design properties across screens. OpenDesign installs three ways: a desktop app, from source, or via Docker.
